about.title: About Me
about.subTitle: My introduction
about.description: Full-Stack with 5+ years of experience delivering scalable solutions in banking, fintech, and enterprise environments. My work spans front-end architecture   React, Angular, Design Systems, Microfrontends   through full-stack development with Node.js and Python, backed by CI/CD practices on AWS and Azure DevOps.

testimonial.firstDescription: It's a pleasure to work with and recommend André Leite. A focused   who consistently delivers in Front-End and Mobile. He stood out for the quality of his solutions and his ability to drive results in a collaborative environment.
